source_description: Reference implementation of CTS-1 from Soul.md RFC-1 (rokoss21/soul.md): static conformance (parse, schema-validate, composition-resolve, report) plus a thin multi-turn behavioral slice (verbosity, brief refusals, rude->cold_strict state shift) graded k-of-n against BYOM OpenAI-compatible endpoints (local Ollama GPU + hosted incl. NVIDIA NIM).
